snippet.description:
A Language Called Love follows Lotanna, a struggling PhD researcher haunted by a lifetime of being labeled a failure. Sent to a rural Yoruba community to complete a crucial study, he finds himself immersed in a world of traditions, different personalities, and unexpected friendships. As he learns the true meaning of communication, belonging, and identity, Lotanna discovers that home is more than a place. I is a language spoken through people, culture, and connection.

Blaqbonez (born Akumefule Chukwuemeka George) is a Nigerian rapper and singer-songwriter known for his chops as an audacious lyricist, energetic flow, and witty wordplay. Signed to Chocolate City Music, the self-proclaimed, "Best Rapper in Africa" (BRIA), grew to mainstream consciousness in 2019 and has since solidified his place in the industry meshing his Igbo, Yoruba and Urhobo cultural upbringing with music influences from Afropop, trap, and hip hop, to electronic music.
